Class ScannedReceipt

java.lang.Object
com.finvision.model.ScannedReceipt
@CompoundIndexes(@CompoundIndex(name="username_yearmonth_idx",def="{'username': 1, 'yearMonth': 1}")) public class ScannedReceipt extends Object
MongoDB document representing a manually entered or scanned receipt.

Records an actual spending transaction with merchant name, dollar amount, spending category, date, optional notes, and an optional Base64-encoded image thumbnail. The yearMonth field (format: YYYY-MM) is indexed together with username for fast monthly filtering.

Stored in the scanned_receipts collection.
